commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper verdict: pass (sha=89cca8dd015e9865206ec41ec55985a356a9a6d6); failed required checks before automerge: Real behavior proof:CANCELLED
commands.review_summary:
The branch clears WebChat local run and stream state after terminal session reconciliation, threads Gateway `clientRunId` into lifecycle session events, adjusts deferred history and queue flushing, adds focused regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the focused regression shape. Current main applies terminal `sessions.changed` rows without invoking chat-run reconciliation, while the PR body and linked recording describe the stale WebChat typing indicator symptom.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair lane is needed; the PR is already automerge-opted, has no discrete review finding, and should be governed by exact-head checks plus maintainer merge policy.

target.title: Fix stale WebChat typing indicator after terminal session patch
target.body:
## Summary

- clear local WebChat run state when an applied `sessions.changed` patch marks the current session terminal
- keep the existing full `sessions.list` reconciliation path using the same helper
- add regression coverage for a terminal session patch clearing `chatRunId` and an empty `chatStream`

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5b7504ae-b643-4616-ab2b-7ee50be10010


Behavior addressed: WebChat could keep showing the typing indicator after the final assistant response was already rendered and the Gateway session was terminal.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw Gateway from the PR 70543 review worktree, Control UI at `http://localhost:19011/`, Gateway at `ws://127.0.0.1:19010`, provider/model `atlassian-aigw/gpt-5.5-2026-04-23`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reproduced the stuck UI with a WebChat exec-denial turn, queried `sessions.list` and `chat.history` through a local Gateway client, then added and ran the focused controller regression test in this branch.

Evidence after fix: the new regression test first failed with `expected 'run-1' to be null`; after the patch, `ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts` passed with 29 tests.

Observed result after fix: applying a terminal `sessions.changed` patch for the active session now clears `chatRunId`, `chatStream`, and `chatStreamStartedAt`, removing the stale typing indicator state.

What was not tested: a rebuilt browser bundle against the live local Gateway after this branch was split into its own worktree.
target.author: jesse-merhi

commands.author: jesse-merhi
